title: Orlando Heat Wave
lead: Orlando is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.26. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, scoring 10.0/10 on our severity scale.
body:
The current heat wave in Orlando has brought extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 31%, and wind speeds are moderate at 13.5 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, highlighting the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
